A. cable
B. banana

What could be the possible causes of toothache?

admin
Possible causes of a toothache include cavities (tooth decay), infected teeth (such as abscesses), cracked or broken teeth, gum disease, exposed tooth root due to receding gums, and sometimes sinus issues can also cause pain that feels like it's coming from your teeth.
